name: Signal Distortion Catalog
description: Nine systematic failures where institutional measurement systems distort or suppress signals from consequence-exposed operators. Each distortion is an equation boundary — a place where standard models stop asking questions.
core_thesis: Receiving systems — data architectures, regulatory frameworks, automation pipelines, compensation models — distort or fail to capture the signal generated by consequence-exposed operation. These distortions are mutually reinforcing.

distortions.name: Distance as Uniform Unit
distortions.distortion: Treats identical miles across vastly different thermodynamic conditions as equivalent
distortions.physics_violation: Non-linear energy cost treated as linear. 1 mile in winter != 1 mile in summer thermodynamically.

distortions.name: Operator Interchangeability
distortions.distortion: Assumes certification equals competence across all conditions
distortions.physics_violation: Treats variable skill as constant. Ignores experience as accumulated energy.

distortions.name: Fatigue Measured by Time
distortions.distortion: HOS regulations measure elapsed hours rather than cognitive depletion rates
distortions.physics_violation: Energy depletion is not clock-linear. Thermodynamic load varies by condition.

distortions.name: Crash Involvement vs. Causation
distortions.distortion: Conflates downstream cascade-victims with originating-cause operators
distortions.physics_violation: Causality violation. Effect attributed to wrong source. Breaks CAUSALITY axiom.

distortions.name: Seasonal Data Smoothing
distortions.distortion: Averages winter risk across annual calculations
distortions.physics_violation: Averaging destroys peak information. The peak IS the signal.

distortions.name: Automation Training Gap
distortions.distortion: Systems validated in favorable conditions deployed in severe environments
distortions.physics_violation: Training distribution != deployment distribution. Model scope violation.

distortions.name: Flat Compensation
distortions.distortion: Pays identical rates regardless of thermodynamic work performed
distortions.physics_violation: Energy output varies, compensation doesn't. Conservation violation — work not accounted for.

distortions.name: Institutional Knowledge Hierarchy
distortions.distortion: Rejects operator-generated empirical data as anecdotal
distortions.physics_violation: Measurement source rejected not on accuracy but on social position. ORACLE_MONOPOLY.

distortions.name: Automation Self-Preservation
distortions.distortion: Automation designed for vehicle preservation, not civilian-priority ethics
distortions.physics_violation: Optimization target misaligned with stated purpose. Scope violation.

meta_pattern: These 9 distortions are self-reinforcing. Each one makes the others harder to detect. Together they form a measurement infrastructure that produces favorable metrics while eroding actual safety buffers. This IS a CORDYCEPS pattern at institutional scale.
